<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<XcosDiagram debugLevel="0" finalIntegrationTime="30.0"

  <Array as="context" scilabClass="String[]"></Array>

      <BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="CONST_m" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" style="CONST_m" simulationFunctionName="cstblk4" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN">
        <ScilabString as="exprs" height="1" width="1"><data line="0" column="0" value="5"/></ScilabString>

        <ScilabDouble as="integerParameters" height="0" width="0"/>

      <ExplicitOutputPort id="p1" parent="b1" ordering="1" dataType="REAL_MATRIX" dataColumns="1" dataLines="1" initialState="0.0" style="ExplicitOutputPort;align=right;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10.0" value=""/>

      <!-- PRODUCT: (g/L) * sin(theta) -->
      <RoundBlock id="b3" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="PRODUCT" blockType="c" dependsOnU="1" dependsOnT="0" style="PRODUCT" simulationFunctionName="prod" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN">
